gaps.description: Docker deployment (Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, setup.sh) now present in install/
Remote profiles.json fetch with local cache — CDN URL configured but fallback to default.json not fully verified
Hardware-adaptive model selection wired through optimizer.js into llm.js loadConfig()
Multi-device session coordination (joinSession/broadcastSession) implemented; deep cross-device AI brain state sharing is minimal
Ollama auto-install and model pull with progress display implemented in cli/setup.js
sense.js perception runtime is browser-only (videoElement); no server-side headless camera path
Wake word detection in UI composable (useWakeWord.js) but not integrated into server-side always-on pipeline
Voice latency <2s end-to-end (STT+LLM+TTS) not benchmarked or enforced in code
HTTPS / LAN tunneling for secure multi-device access not implemented
LLM runtime with local Ollama + cloud fallback (OpenAI/Anthropic)
STT/TTS adaptive runtime with cloud fallback
Memory module with vector embedding (agentic-store + agentic-embed)
REST API with all required endpoints (/api/chat, /api/transcribe, /api/synthesize, /api/status, /api/config)
Admin UI and client voice UI (Vue 3 + Vite)
Hardware detection (GPU/memory/arch) for Apple Silicon / NVIDIA / CPU-only
